name: linResetManualChecksum
title: linResetManualChecksum
description: Sets the correct checksum of a LIN frame, whose checksum has been changed by using linSetManualChecksum() function. The checksum is calculated using the frame data.

parameters.name: linFrame
parameters.description: LIN frame for which the correct checksum will be used again.

description: Reset checksum error caused by previously called linSetManualChecksum()
